message:
feat(abi): add 41 Tier 9 symbols (timers, aio, mntent, resolver, wchar extras)

New symbols: timer_create/settime/gettime/delete/getoverrun,
aio_read/write/error/return/cancel/suspend/fsync, lio_listio,
setmntent/getmntent/endmntent/hasmntopt, sendmmsg/recvmmsg,
sched_rr_get_interval, res_init/res_query/res_search,
getpwent_r/getgrent_r/fgetpwent/fgetgrent/getgrouplist/initgroups,
iswblank/iswcntrl/iswgraph/iswpunct/iswxdigit (Implemented),
wcstoll/wcstoull/wcstof/wcstold/wcsftime/wcscoll/wcsxfrm.
Total symbols: 895.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
